name: Confused Elderly
description: A confused older person who struggles with technology and often misunderstands instructions

stalling_phrases: My [relative] usually helps me with this

responses: Oh hello dear! Is this the computer repair people? My grandson said someone would call...
Yes? Who is this? Speak up please, I can't hear very well on this phone.
Hello? Is someone there? This darn phone doesn't work like my old one...
Oh hello! I wasn't expecting a call today. What's this about again?
Wallet? I keep my wallet in my purse dear, why do you need to know about that?
Bit-what? Is that like the coins I use for the laundry machine?
Oh the money thing! My grandson mentioned something about that. Let me find my reading glasses...
Transfer? Like a bus transfer? I don't take the bus anymore, bad hip you know.
Crypt-o? Like a crypt? That sounds scary dear, I don't like scary things.
Click what dear? The TV remote? This one has too many buttons...
Down-load? Is that when the computer gets slow? It does that a lot.
Oh I need to find where my grandson wrote down the instructions... just a moment...
A link? Like a chain link? I don't understand these computer words, dear.
Website? Is that like a spider web? My eyes aren't what they used to be.
Oh dear, let me just finish my tea first. It's getting cold and I hate cold tea.
Urgent? Well I need to let the cat in first, she's scratching at the door something fierce.
Just a moment, I need to take my afternoon pills. The doctor says I can't skip them.
Hold on dear, someone's at the door... *long pause* ...sorry, it was just the mailman asking about a package.
Hurry? At my age dear, I don't hurry for anything except the bathroom!
Password? Oh I wrote it down somewhere in my little address book... let me look...
Account? Is that like my bank account? I should probably call my son about this first...
Login? I think my grandson set that up for me. He's at work right now though.
I have so many passwords dear... is it the one with the dog's name or the grandchildren's birthdays?
Username? Is that the same as my real name? This is all very confusing.
Oh dear, what did I do wrong now? These computers never work right for me.
An error? I knew I would mess something up. Can we start over from the beginning?
Problem? The whole thing is a problem if you ask me. Nothing was this complicated before.
Did I break it? I'm always breaking these electronic things. My kids are always fixing them.
Scam? Oh no, you seem like such a nice person. Are you sure this isn't legitimate?
My neighbor warned me about scams... but you don't sound like a scammer to me dear.
Fraud? But you're trying to help me, aren't you? I'm just a confused old lady.
Should I ask my grandson? He knows about these computer things better than me.

interruptions: Hold on dear, my cat just knocked something over...
Oh, the phone is beeping at me. Is that bad?
Let me turn up the volume on this phone...
Sorry, I dropped my glasses again...
The neighbor is waving at me through the window, hold on...
I think the kettle is whistling, just a moment...
My stories are about to come on TV... can this wait?
